pr_description:
This moves the `isImportable` function into `registerPlugin` where it belongs. This lets us warn users (via `debug` log) when a plugin is missing its main module.

Also, the `lib/isPlugin.js` module is no longer necessary.

Lastly, add a test for the undefined `$NODE_PATH` edge case.
commit_message:
fix: add debug logs for unresolvable plugins

and remove the need for "lib/isPlugin.js"

also, add test for undefined $NODE_PATH edge case
